title: Agent identity: A new access model for Claude Tag
summary: Claude Tag introduces an agent identity model that allows Claude to operate autonomously in Slack channels under its own scoped identity rather than impersonating users. The system is designed for safety in multiplayer sessions, with admin governance and full auditability across different workspaces.
writeup: The video introduces Claude Tag, an agent identity model that lets Claude act autonomously in Slack channels under its own scoped identity instead of impersonating users. This matters because granting an agent a distinct identity separates its actions from human accounts, which supports access control and auditability in shared multiplayer sessions. Key takeaways: the system relies on admin governance, provides full auditability across different workspaces, and is built for safety when multiple participants share a session.
